hero.title: Fresh Homemade Food Delivered Daily
hero.subtitle: Authentic homemade taste, prepared with love and delivered fresh to your doorstep

about.title: Our Homemade Story
about.description: We started with a simple dream - to bring the warmth of homemade food to every household. Every dish is prepared with the same care and love that goes into a mother's cooking.

features.title: Fresh Ingredients
features.description: We source the freshest vegetables and finest spices daily from local markets.

features.title: Made with Love
features.description: Every meal is prepared with the same affection as home-cooked food.

features.title: Quality Assured
features.description: Strict hygiene standards and quality checks for every order.

testimonials.name: Priya Sharma
testimonials.text: The food tastes exactly like my mother's cooking. Absolutely loved the dal makhani and butter chicken!

testimonials.name: Rahul Verma
testimonials.text: Best homemade food delivery in the city. Fresh, tasty and always on time. Highly recommended!

testimonials.name: Anita Gupta
testimonials.text: Great variety of dishes. The rotis are soft and fresh. My family enjoys ordering from here every weekend.

testimonials.name: Vikram Patel
testimonials.text: Authentic flavors, generous portions, and excellent packaging. This is my go-to place for homemade food.
